sample_reviews.author: James T.
sample_reviews.text: Gondal Plumbing were fast, professional and very fairly priced. Fixed our burst pipe within hours of calling. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M.
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant service from start to finish. Turned up on time, explained everything clearly and left the place spotless. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: Ahmed R.
sample_reviews.text: Good, reliable plumber. Sorted our bathroom installation without any fuss. Competitive pricing and very tidy work.

brand.usp: Gondal Plumbing delivers fast, reliable plumbing services across Manchester with transparent pricing and a commitment to quality workmanship. From emergency call-outs to full bathroom installations, we get the job done right first time.
brand.hero_headline: Manchester's Trusted Plumber, Ready When You Need Us
brand.about_paragraph: I'm the founder of Gondal Plumbing, based right here in Manchester, and I take real pride in delivering honest, high-quality plumbing services to homes and businesses across the city. Whether it's an emergency leak or a full bathroom renovation, I bring the same dedication and attention to detail to every job. My goal is simple — to be the plumber you trust and call back every time.
